text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Gimlet... I'm sorry. I didn't mean to look, but I
accidentally saw it...

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Fortuna plays these little games. Pay her
mischief no heed.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
However, you bore witness to my most guarded
secret. I will allow you to keep that forbidden
knowledge—if you keep it to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Top secret... Understood. I give you my word.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
What's under... the eyepatch... Your right eye's
true appearance—I will speak of it to no one.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Good. It cannot come to light... For the unseen
darkness of Privolva is what draws out the moon's
beautiful glow.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: I see... But... I think your right eye...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Was that... insensitive of me to say?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
No. Heh... Ahahaha! To think—the shadow under
the seal could have "beauty"! What a fascinating
take!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Fascinating? I'm glad... you think so.
